mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM projectdb.users WHERE email = #{email})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.users (email, password_hash, name, phone, addr, birth, gender, photo, provider, provider_id, role) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{addr}, #{birth}, #{gender}, #{photo}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, email, password_hash AS passwordHash, name, phone, addr, birth, gender, photo, provider, provider_id AS providerId, role FROM projectDB.users WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE projectdb.users SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, addr = #{addr}, birth = #{birth}, gender = #{gender}, photo = #{photo} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE projectdb.users SET phone = #{phone}, addr = #{addr}, birth = #{birth}, gender = #{gender} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
